name: OSIsoft PI (AVEVA PI) Time Series API
what_it_does: OSIsoft PI System (now AVEVA PI) REST Web API for operational technology (OT) time series data platform. Enables AI agents to manage real-time sensor and process data retrieval from PI Historian for industrial monitoring, handle PI tag and asset framework (PI AF) hierarchical data model navigation, access historical process data with interpolation and aggregation for analytics, retrieve alarm and event data from industrial equipment and process systems, manage PI data archive queries for energy, process, and equipment analytics, handle bulk time series data retrieval for machine learning model training, access PI server asset hierarchy and parent-child equipment relationships, retrieve PI DataLink-equivalent data programmatically for engineering analysis, manage PI Notification subscription for process event alerting, and integrate PI historian data with cloud analytics, ML platforms, and enterprise IT systems.
use_cases: Retrieving process sensor data from industrial analytics agents
Monitoring equipment OEE from manufacturing optimization agents
Analyzing energy consumption trends from sustainability agents
Integrating historian data with ML pipelines from industrial AI agents
not_for: Commercial building systems without industrial process and manufacturing focus
Financial or business data without time series process data needs
Simple IoT without enterprise historian and asset hierarchy requirements
best_when: An industrial company running OSIsoft PI Historian wants AI agents to automate process data retrieval, anomaly detection, energy analytics, equipment performance monitoring, and ML pipeline integration.
avoid_when: SAFETY RISK: PI System is the data backbone for many industrial safety monitoring systems; automated PI data interpretation for safety-critical decisions requires certified process and safety engineer review. PI Notification automation for process alarms requires alarm management design review — automated alarm response without operator involvement violates ISA-18.2 alarm management standards.

auth.notes: PI Web API uses Kerberos, Basic, and OAuth 2.0 authentication depending on deployment. On-premise PI server authentication via Windows/Kerberos is most common. AVEVA PI Cloud connects to Microsoft Azure for cloud auth. Open-source client libraries on GitHub (osisoft). OSIsoft acquired by AVEVA (2021, $5B). San Leandro, California origin.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise license based on tag count
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual license per PI Server tag count (points); AVEVA PI Vision and PI Web API included
pricing.notes: San Leandro, California. OSIsoft founded 1980. Acquired by AVEVA (2021, $5B acquisition). 1,000+ operations data tags now AVEVA PI. 19,000+ customers globally in energy, chemicals, utilities, and manufacturing. PI System is OT data backbone for 65%+ of global industrial companies. Competes with GE Historian for process historian market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per PI Web API server configuration; varies by on-premise deployment

known_agent_gotchas: SAFETY RISK: PI System hosts safety-critical process monitoring data; automated alarm response automation must follow ISA-18.2 alarm management standards with operator-in-the-loop
Kerberos/Windows auth complexity — on-premise PI Web API commonly uses Kerberos or Windows auth; OAuth is available but less common on-premise; understand your PI server auth configuration
On-premise network access — PI servers are on OT networks with restricted internet access; cloud API agents require VPN or AVEVA PI Cloud deployment with internet connectivity
PI tag namespace — PI data is organized by tag name with plant/area/equipment hierarchy; understand the PI tag naming convention for your plant before querying
Bulk data retrieval — requesting large historical data ranges (months) for ML training via PI Web API is slow; use PI Data Archive bulk download tools for large data extraction
AVEVA PI rebrand — OSIsoft acquired by AVEVA (2021); PI System rebranding to AVEVA PI; documentation and API endpoints in transition; verify current documentation location
agent_readiness.security_notes: Industrial OT time series historian. SOC2, IEC62443, NERC-CIP. Kerberos/OAuth2. US/EU/on-premise. Process sensor and industrial operations data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Industrial historian and OT. IEC62443, NERC-CIP. Kerberos/OAuth2. On-premise. Process sensor and safety data.
